name: IPC-DCOM-Fuzzer NDR Extractor
description: Extract RPC/DCOM interfaces and NDR-decoded method signatures, then rename and comment server handler functions.
longdescription:
Calls the ndr-core cdylib to statically decode Microsoft RPC/DCOM interfaces (interface UUIDs, per-method NDR parameter signatures) directly from the loaded PE, then annotates the BinaryView: names each RPC_SERVER_INTERFACE structure and renames/comments the server-side handler functions recovered from the dispatch table.

Requires the ndr-core dynamic library (ndr_core.dll / libndr_core.so / libndr_core.dylib). Build it with `cargo build -p ndr-core --release` and either leave it under `target/release`, set the `NDR_CORE_LIB` environment variable to its path, or copy it next to this plugin.

license.name: MIT
license.text: Dual-licensed MIT OR Apache-2.0; see repository LICENSE files.

installinstructions.Windows: Build ndr-core (`cargo build -p ndr-core --release`) and ensure ndr_core.dll is discoverable (target/release, NDR_CORE_LIB, or beside this plugin).
installinstructions.Linux: Build ndr-core (`cargo build -p ndr-core --release`) and ensure libndr_core.so is discoverable (target/release, NDR_CORE_LIB, or beside this plugin).
installinstructions.Darwin: Build ndr-core (`cargo build -p ndr-core --release`) and ensure libndr_core.dylib is discoverable (target/release, NDR_CORE_LIB, or beside this plugin).

author: LiquidWorm
